title: Automatically assigns a task to someone when an item has a specific word
excerpt:
Hello everyone! Just checking if anyone knows how to make this automation? 
When an Item is created on a board it will be automatically assigned to a person only if the item has a specific word.

posts.author: k.intal (Keif Intal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone! Just checking if anyone knows how to make this automation?

When an Item is created on a board it will be automatically assigned to a person only if the item has a specific word.
